title: helichrysum crispum
intro: Helichrysum crispum, also known as the strawflower, is a flowering plant species native to South Africa. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Helichrysum crispum include reducing inflammation, soothing wounds, and relieving pain. The plant can be used in various herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and essential oils, which are used to promote relaxation, improve skin health, and support immune function.
